global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with abstract shapes and prominent text.
global.main_message: Promoting new music hits with a call to action.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes, including an oval and a square, in lighter shades of orange, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in a lighter hue, overlapping with other shapes, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A semi-transparent overlay shape that adds visual interest, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom center, contributing to the abstract design.

elements.label: Another small circle
elements.description: Another small circular shape, similar to the previous one, positioned nearby to create balance.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Stream the hype New hits every week', prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: MoonScreen logo
elements.description: The logo 'MoonScreen' appears at the top left in a bold, modern font, contrasting against the orange background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A white button with the text 'Order now' at the bottom center, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small 'UGC' icon located at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and abstract, promoting new music.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, with the logo at the top left and the CTA at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype New hits every week, MoonScreen, Order now, UGC
